name: Danske Invest Europa Indeks KL DKK d
summary: Danske Invest Europa Indeks KL DKK d is a European equity index fund. The fund seeks to replicate the performance of a broad European equity market index, providing investors with diversified exposure to the European stock market, denominated in DKK. It is managed by Danske Invest and offers a cost-effective way to track the overall performance of European equities.
